description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update Precompiled Tools that can be triggered manually with inputs for pushing to a repository, creating full and new binaries artifacts, and performing a minimal test build. On a Windows 2019 environment, check out a repository, set up MSBuild, run CMake, and then conditionally build various targets with MSBuild. Upload full and new precompiled tools as artifacts, copy binaries, commit changes, and push them to a specified repository if configured to do so.
